message:
fix(client): add pagination safety limits and infinite loop detection to list methods

Add pagination safeguards to list_tools, list_resources, list_resource_templates,
and list_prompts to prevent infinite loops from misbehaving servers:

- Hard limit of 10,000 pages before returning an error
- Cursor repeat detection via HashSet to catch servers that return the
  same cursor indefinitely
- Descriptive error messages for each failure case

Also fix minor documentation in macros crate: "default expression" → "default value".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
